active_drafts.name: draft-ietf-wimse-arch
active_drafts.title: Workload Identity in a Multi System Environment (WIMSE) Architecture

active_drafts.name: draft-ietf-wimse-http-signature
active_drafts.title: WIMSE Workload-to-Workload Authentication with HTTP Signatures

recent_commits.message: We should not suggest logging access tokens
Moved WIMSE identifier to a separate draft
JK review part I - as far as line 206
Move wimse URI scheme to identifier draft; drop duplicate IANA (#207) (#225)
Add sentence about iss restrictions/allow list (#224)
Clarify iss RECOMMENDED for auditing and ops (#169) (#220)
Fix README links for all active drafts (#218) (#219)
Inline the ABNF for the Workload-Proof-Token Header Field (#210)
Clarify difference between signature lifetime and WIT lifetime (#191)
Fix typos and enhance clarity in markdown document (#65)
[WIP] try out how service mesh section feels (#63)
Added atomicity and flushing requirements to filesystem section (#62)
Added Identifier Interpretation and Mapping section
Focus on WIMSE, but allow other use cases
tweak CSS for boxes on main screen
make single recordings button with list
Improved landing page for the WIMSE project
